top_signals.title: OECD warns of global slowdown as U.S.-Iran war stymies economic growth prospects
top_signals.summary: The OECD has cut its global growth outlook, warning of lasting damage caused by the Middle East conflict.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Treasury issues sanctions on Iran, targets 4 crypto exchanges
top_signals.summary: The sanctions come four days after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US had seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iranian crypto exchanges and wallets since late February.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin falls below $66K as US and Iran launch new strikes
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin saw its largest daily drop since early February on Tuesday as the cryptocurrency shed more than $4,500 in a single day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: California natural gas prices reach historic lows in early 2026
top_signals.summary: Monthly average natural gas spot prices in California reached record lows in the first five months of 2026, dropping to values last recorded in the nationwide low-price market of 2024. Record lows were recorded in Northern California's PG&E Citygate and Southern California's SoCal Border Average; SoCal Citygate prices fell to near-record lows but remained higher than some 2024 prices. Several factors contribute to California's low prices, including above-average inventories and decreasing in-state demand for natural gas-fired electricity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Neo4j Acquires GraphAware to Launch Intelligence Analysis Alternative to Palantir Gotham
top_signals.summary: Graph intelligence leaders will join forces to deliver a customer-proven, open-standards intelligence analysis platform that ensures data sovereignty
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Begins Rebuilding His Tariff Wall With Proposed New Levies
top_signals.summary: The US is proposing new tariff of at least 10% on imports from 60 trading partners in President Donald Trump’s biggest move to rebuild his protectionist wall since his earlier levies were struck down by the US Supreme Court.

top_signals.title: New York and Europe’s finance watchdogs team up to police stablecoins
top_signals.summary: Some of the information that New York and the European Union’s watchdogs will share includes the issued stablecoin, total volume in circulation and the number of holders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
